messages.content: Hey Matt, got a Portland run for you. Thu-Sat, $2,200 all-in. Departure 5 AM Thursday from Commerce Rd. You want it?
yeah ill take it
Good deal. BOL and route info in your email. Delivery Portland ME terminal by 2 PM Friday, return pickup 5 PM same day.
got it
Safe travels.
on the road, traffic near baltimore but should be fine
Copy.
stopping for fuel in jersey, on schedule
pulling over outside hartford for the night
10-4. ETA tomorrow?
by 2 if traffic cooperates
back on the road
delivered
Good deal. Return BOL is set, pickup at 5.
loaded up, heading south
stopping in CT for the night
back on the road
back at richmond terminal
Good run. Pay hits next Friday.
thanks lenny
Hey Matt, got a quick Norfolk run Wed-Thu. $900. You want it?
cant do wed, got emma. anyone else free?
No worries, I'll ask Rivera.
Rivera took it. Got a Hartford run next week if you want it.
yeah lmk the details
Will do. Probably Mon-Wed.
Hey Matt. Got a Hartford run nobody wants. Departs Friday Apr 3 early AM, back Monday the 6th. $2,400 all in. I know it's last minute but Barnes called out and I need somebody reliable. You in?
Hey, dispatch changed my schedule this week. I'm on a run through Saturday. Can we move Emma to next weekend?
This is your custody weekend Matthew. Friday 6 PM to Sunday 6 PM.
I know, I'm sorry. it was last minute
It's always last minute. I'll handle it.
thank you. next weekend instead?
We'll see.
I'll make it up to her I promise
tell her I'm sorry
She was looking forward to this weekend.
I know
Check your email.
denise come on
I'm driving back now. should be home tonight
Noted.
picking emma up from bus tomorrow, ill have her back by 8
She has math homework due Thursday.
got it
Soccer registration. $225. I've asked twice.
Deadline is March 1.
I'm tight this month. Working on it.
That's what you said in November.
november was different I had the car repairs
There's always something.
I'll have it by next week
You said that last time.
I am telling you I will pay it
By when.
end of first week of feb
Noted.
hows emma doing btw
Soccer registration closes March 1. $225 is your half. Venmo or check.
I know, I'm working on it.
It's been a week.
I said I'm working on it Denise
Emma asked me today if she's playing this spring.
of course she is
I need an answer.
end of the week. I promise
I paid it. I'm noting this.
I was going to pay it
Check your email.
are you serious with the attorney
over $225
Over a pattern.
hey emma wants to do a birthday thing at my place saturday. couple of her friends coming over
Her birthday is Monday.
I know. she said your doing dinner on her actual birthday. just want to do something on my weekend too
Fine. Have her back by 6 Sunday.
of course
hey corinne, need a favor
Sure! What's up?
taking the sentra to meineke saturday morning for brakes. any chance you could follow me over and give me a ride back
Of course! What time are you thinking?
like 9. its the one on hull street
I know the one! 9 works. And you'll need a ride back to pick it up too?
yeah probly sunday afternoon if thats ok
No problem at all. Just text me when they say it's ready!
will do. thanks
heading to meineke, you good to follow me?
Yep! Walking to my car now.
dropped the keys off, im in the lot
I see you! Coming around.
meineke said the sentras done
Want me to drive you over?
yeah whenever ur free
Give me 10 minutes!
all good, thanks again corinne
How much did it end up being?
380. pads and rotors
That's not bad! Mine was like 500 last year for just the front.
yeah coulda been worse
Hey Corinne, any chance you can grab Emma from the bus today? I'm stuck on a route and wont be back until Saturday
Of course! What time does her bus get there?
3:25 at the semmes stop
Perfect, I'll be there! Does she need anything from your place?
she's got her backpack with everything. maybe just some snacks shes always starving lol
Ha! I'll have something ready for her. Don't worry about a thing, Matthew.
you're the best. Denise should pick her up from your place later tonight
Sounds good! Drive safe out there.
thanks
Got her! She's at my kitchen table doing homework. Fed her apple slices and peanut butter.
thank you so much
She says to tell you hi and she wants pizza when you get home!
haha tell her deal
Denise just picked her up. Everything went smoothly!
really appreciate it Corinne
hey corinne, you have thanksgiving plans?
Hi Matthew! Nothing set in stone. My sister was talking about visiting but that fell through. Why?
im doing a full thanksgiving here. turkey all the fixings. emma will be here too. you should come
Oh I would love that! Are you sure it's not too much?
not at all. the more the merrier
Then absolutely yes! Can I bring something? I make a really good sweet potato casserole.
that would be perfect. one less thing i gotta worry about
Ha! What time are you thinking?
dinner around 2 but come whenever. gonna start the turkey early
I'll pop over around noon and help you set up!
sounds good
This is going to be wonderful. Tell Emma I can't wait!
Casserole is prepped and in my fridge! Need anything else for tomorrow?
nah we're set. got everything on the instacart order
Exciting! See you tomorrow!
On my way over! Casserole is warm and ready.
door's open
hey heading to pocahontas tomorrow morning. camping thru sunday
Oh fun! Solo trip?
yeah just need to get out for a bit
That sounds wonderful. Supposed to be nice this weekend!
hope so. got everything packed
Have a great time! I'll keep an eye on things here.
thanks
back. that was exactly what i needed
Welcome home! How was it?
great. hiked the old mill trail and beaver lake loop. barely saw anyone
I love that park in the winter. Glad you got some time to recharge!
yeah its different when nobodys there
Nothing like quiet time in the woods!
hey my kitchen sink is leaking pretty bad. water under the cabinet. you notice anything on your side?
Oh no! Let me go check real quick.
My side seems totally fine. No leaks that I can see.
You should call the landlord right away!
yeah gonna call him now
already got towels down but its still dripping pretty good
Try turning off the valve under the sink if you can reach it!
good call found the shutoff. stopped for now
Oh good! That should hold until the plumber can come.
talked to frank. hes getting a plumber out this week
Good. At least it's not a full emergency! Let me know if you need anything.
hey heads up plumber coming tomorrow morning. frank said they might have to shut the water off for a bit
Thanks for the warning! What time roughly?
he said around 10. probably an hour or so
Got it. I'll fill up some water jugs just in case!
smart
plumber just left. new supply line on the faucet. all fixed
That was quick! Water back on?
yep all good. frank said hes covering it too
Oh wonderful! Glad it wasn't anything major.
hey saw that pta email
maybe dont mention us specifically on the thread
What do you mean?
the part about your neighbors daughter emma
denise is on that email too
Oh gosh, I didn't even think about that!
I'm so sorry Matthew.
no its totally fine just for future stuff
she doesnt need to connect those dots u know
You're absolutely right. I wasn't thinking.
appreciate it
Of course! Sorry, didn't think about it. No worries!
I won't bring it up on the thread again.
ur good corinne dont stress
Okay good! Let me know if you need me to pick up Emma this week.
will do thanks
hey corinne, doing a little birthday party for emma saturday. you wanna come over?
Oh how exciting! Of course! How old is she turning?
12 on monday but this weekends my custody weekend
Happy to help set up! I'll make brownies.
that would be awesome. shes having 2 friends over too
How fun! What time?
like 2
I'll come over around 1 and help you decorate!
ur a lifesaver
Do you need me to get anything? I have leftover streamers from the school carnival.
oh nice yeah bring those. ordering the rest off instacart tomorrow
Perfect! She's going to love it. 🎂
Brownies are out of the oven! Heading over in about 20 min.
perfect timing. just put up the balloons
On my way!

Hey Matthew! I ran into Denise at Emma's game this morning. She was asking me if I ever see Emma after school on your days. I just said I don't really keep track of the schedule. Wanted to let you know though! Hope that was the right thing to say 😊
dad r u picking me up tmrw
yep ill be at the stop
yayyy 🎉
can we make tacos
sure
omg yesss 🌮🌮
ok see u tmrw ❤️
dad im on the bus
k im at the stop
dad i need help with science fair its a solar system model
its due the 22nd
oh cool yeah I can help
when do u wanna work on it
this weekend plsss 🙏
yeah ill be home
yayyyy 🪐
what materials do u need
like styrofoam balls and paint
ms chen gave us a list hold on
heres the list
got it ill order the stuff
ur the best 💕
dad did u get the stuff yet
ordering tonite
ok so i was thinking we paint them diffrent colors for each planet
yeah makes sense. jupiter should be the big one
duh lol
and we use the dowels to stick them on the poster board
we should get a black board so it looks like space
omg yes
and maybe glitter for stars??
lol sure ill add glitter
saturn needs rings tho
we can cut those from cardboard
ok this is gonna be so cool
alyssa is doing a volcano 🌋
classic. ours will be better
lol obviously
ok ordering now. see u saturday em
dad am i playing soccer this spring
my friend alyssa is on the team too
yes of course you are
yayyyy ⚽
when does it start
march I think
mom signed me up for soccer!!
practice starts next week
im so excited ⚽⚽⚽
thats great em
dad can we do a bday thing at ur place this weekend plsss 🎂🎉
like a little party
with cake and stuff
your birthday isnt till the 9th lol
ik but im at ur place this weekend
and mom said shes doing dinner on my actual bday
yeah ok lets do it saturday
YAYYYY 🎉🎉🎉
can i invite alyssa and madison
sure
ok what kind of cake are u making
what kind do you want
chocolate obviously 🍫
lol obviously. pizza too?
yesssss
omg this is gonna be so fun
ill get everything friday. you just show up and have fun
ur the best dad 💕
dad are you gonna be home this friday?? corinne said she might be busy so idk whats happening
lmaooo matt took lamar first round
smart pick honestly
best qb in the league dont @ me
ur gonna regret not taking cmc
cmc is washed bro
exactly
saving this for later
ur team is trash lol
bro ur down by 30
still got monday night
garrett ur cooked
lol
gg already
watch
same thing every week
ok matt real talk
trade me lamar
no way dude
ill give u derrik henry AND jaylen waddle
lol henry is on a bye week
that trade is terrible
stay out of this D
garrett is desperate lmao
not happening
u dont deserve him
2 seed lets go
how tf did garrett make playoffs
because im built different
im out smh
better luck next year D
im comign for that 1 seed matt
championship game lets gooo
its not over yet
lol yes it is
im up 40 already lol
shoulda traded me lamar tyler
next year
whatever
congrats matt
gg
pay up boys
bro u sniped lamar right before me
lol shoulda been faster
ok fr tho ur team is actualy good
told u
still gonna beat u tho
come on man just take the trade
nah lamar is my guy
yo you doing anything for thanksgiving
nah prolly just gonna order chinese lol
why whats up
come over. turkey and all the sides. emmas helping with the pie
bro yes
what time
like 2. come whenever tho
im there
want me to bring anything
beer
say less
corinnes coming too
nice
omw
got a six pack of hardywood
perfect. doors open
great weekend in the woods. needed that
nice where'd u go
pocahontas
oh sick
solo?
yeah just me and a tent
thats dope
hiked like 8 miles saturday. legs are wrecked
lmao ur fitbit prolly went crazy
lol yeah 12k steps
damn thats solid
we should do that sometime
for sure. got a solid spot
bet
if u win im not hearing the end of this am i
already picking out my trophy spot
gg man good season
landlord bumping rent 50 bucks
another thing on the pile
damn
how much u paying now
going to 1100 april 1
thats not terrible tbh
my rent went up 200 last year
yeah but its on top of everything else
i feel u
asked about doing a longer lease to keep it the same
smart
well see
u could always buy a place
lol with what money
im jsut saying
ETH moons and ur set 🚀
lol ok
hey matt is this still your number? its kevin from VT
holy shit kevin! yeah man whats up
lol just moved back to richmond, we should grab a beer sometime
Hey Matt can I put you down as a reference? Applying at JB Hunt
yeah for sure, good luck man
Happy Thanksgiving nephew. Your mother would be proud of you.
thanks uncle ray. happy thanksgiving
Hey Matthew its Mike from the old place on Broad. You left a box in the storage unit.
oh no kidding. whats in it
Books and some kitchen stuff. I can hold it for a couple weeks if you wanna swing by.
Does anyone know whose recycling bin is blocking the sidewalk?
thats mine sorry ill move it
Thank you!
power out for anyone else?
Yes! Just went out. I called Dominion.
same here
Hey everyone, Tina said no class Thursday. Studio getting new floors.
ugh thanks for the heads up
nooo i was gonna go thursday
Back to normal next week she said
k
who else saw that wreck on 95 near fredericksburg today
dude that was insane. 4 cars
I was 2 miles behind it. Sat there for 3 hours
saw it on waze, took 301 instead
anyone playing madden tonight
im in
maybe later
Saturday game moved to field 3. 9 AM start.
thanks Karen
Do they need snack volunteers for next week?
Yes! Sign up on TeamSnap
ill bring oranges
thanks for the update
Practice cancelled tomorrow. Fields are flooded.
Flu shots now available at your CVS Pharmacy. Walk-ins welcome. Reply STOP to opt out.
Reminder: You have an appointment on 4/2 at 10:30 AM with Dr. Pham. Reply C to confirm, R to reschedule.
C
Your Dominion Energy payment of $142.37 has been received. Thank you.
GEICO: Your auto policy renewal is coming up on 2/1. Log in to review your coverage. Reply STOP to opt out.
Your Amazon package was delivered to your front door.
We've detected a service issue in your area. Estimated restoration: 2:00 PM. We apologize for the inconvenience.
is this the third time this month
Service has been restored in your area. Thank you for your patience.
Your Great Clips check-in is confirmed. Estimated wait: 15 min. 4800 Forest Hill Ave.
Hi Matthew! Election Day is tomorrow. Make your voice heard. Vote YES on Prop 4 for Richmond roads. Paid for by RVA Forward.
Your vehicle warranty is about to expire. Call 1-800-555-0199 to renew your coverage today. Reply STOP to end.
Score 50% off all pizzas this weekend! Use code GAME50 at checkout. Order now. Reply STOP to end.
hey matt, saw something on facebook that reminded me of you lol. we should get a beer soon
you alive over there?
Hi sweetheart! Are you and Emma coming to Uncle Ray's for Christmas dinner? Let me know so I can plan. Love you!
